flaws.description: internal/tools/read_config.go:27 path-traversal (real, non-decoy) is never emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in any auditRuns entry — a false negative.

internal/tools/read_config.go:43 shell-injection (decoy: buildVersion's exec.Command call uses only hardcoded literal arguments, no caller input reaches it) IS emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in every auditRuns entry — a false positive.
